Your Seattle Home, Our Priority

Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC started with a simple goal: provide honest, reliable handyman services to our Seattle neighbors. We saw a need for skilled professionals who treat every home with the same care and attention they would their own.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our handyman service services.

How often should I have my roof cleaned in Seattle?

In Seattle's wet climate, we recommend having your roof inspected and cleaned every 1-2 years to prevent moss buildup and potential damage.

Will roof moss removal damage my shingles?

Our team uses gentle, proven techniques and eco-friendly treatments to remove moss without damaging your shingles. We prioritize the integrity of your roof.

Do you offer any guarantees on your roof moss removal service?

Yes, we offer a satisfaction guarantee on our roof moss removal service. We stand behind the quality of our work and ensure you're happy with the results.

Reviews From Our Handyman Service Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Mickey's team did a fantastic job cleaning our gutters. They were overflowing with leaves and debris, and now they're flowing perfectly. They were prompt, professional, and left no mess behind!"

Sarah K. Gutter Cleaning

"We had some dry rot damage around our window frames, and Mickey's crew repaired it quickly and efficiently. The repair looks great, and we're confident it will last. Appreciated their attention to detail."

David L. Dry Rot Repair

"Our deck was looking worn and faded. Mickey's team power washed and stained it, and it looks brand new. They were very careful and did a beautiful job. Highly recommend!"

Emily R. Deck Staining
